title: juniperus foetida var. virginiana
intro: Juniperus foetida var. virginiana, also known as Rocky Mountain juniper, is a variety of evergreen coniferous tree native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The medicinal properties of this plant include its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Juniperus foetida var. virginiana include reducing urinary tract infections, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used externally and internally to harness its medicinal properties.
